summary: Notification Bug Fixes Testing Complete - All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified: NotificationBell works correctly, no duplicate NotificationCenter at bottom of page, notification dialog opens with 20 items. Reservation detail API returns created_at timestamp correctly.
features_tested: Backend: PUT /api/notifications/mark-all-read endpoint marks all as read - PASSED
Backend: Notification unread_count correctly counts unread using {'$ne': True} query - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/{id}/mark-read marks single notification - PASSED
Backend: Reservation full-detail endpoint returns created_at timestamp - PASSED
Frontend: NotificationBell button found in header - PASSED
Frontend: No duplicate NotificationCenter at bottom of page - PASSED
Frontend: Notification dialog opens correctly with notifications - PASSED
Frontend: Auto-mark-as-read when dialog opens (via useEffect hook) - VERIFIED by code review
critical_code_review_comments: notifications_router.py lines 27-30: Correctly normalizes legacy 'is_read' field to 'read' in list response
notifications_router.py lines 32-34: unread_count uses {'$ne': True} to catch both missing 'read' field and legacy is_read
notifications_router.py lines 54-66: mark-all-read endpoint correctly updates all unread notifications
NotificationBell.jsx lines 23-27: Auto-marks all as read when dialog opens via useEffect with markingRef guard
App.jsx: NotificationCenter component removed (was duplicate at bottom of page)
InfoTabs.jsx lines 29-32: Shows 'Sisteme dusme zamani' (created_at) with fmtDateTime formatting
InfoTabs.jsx lines 35-38: Shows Giris Saati/Cikis Saati with defaults (14:00/12:00)
hotelrunner_sync.py lines 754-792: Notification dedup_key prevents duplicate notifications for same event
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system has been fixed: 1) 'read' field is now used consistently (not 'is_read'), 2) mark-all-read endpoint works, 3) unread_count correctly counts unread, 4) NotificationBell auto-marks as read when dialog opens, 5) No duplicate NotificationCenter at bottom of page. Reservation detail shows created_at timestamp. The PMS Bookings tab uses a quick view dialog (eye icon) with Edit button to open full detail modal.
